7-Day California Itinerary
Hierarchical day allocation + hybrid bandit/optimization route search
Gateway: San Francisco → Los Angeles
Default profile: Balanced
Fastest route estimate: 10.07 hours
Scenic route estimate: 14.16 hours
CA-1 note: San Francisco → Stanford → Santa Cruz is a Silicon Valley detour / connector, not CA-1. Coastal legs after Santa Cruz use CA-1 / PCH where available, with US-101/local connectors where necessary.
Bandit strategy: scenic_social
Posterior reward: 4.127

Balanced 21 6 balanced utility/social/compactness route D1 San Francisco: Da Vinci Hotel, D2 San Francisco: Da Vinci Hotel, D3 Santa Barbara: Harbor View Inn, D4 Santa Barbara: Harbor View Inn, D5 Santa Barbara: Harbor View Inn, D6 Los Angeles: Banana Bungalow West Hollywood, D7 Los Angeles: Banana Bungalow West Hollywood
Explorer 28 6 social must-go and high-utility route D1 San Francisco: Da Vinci Hotel, D2 San Francisco: Da Vinci Hotel, D3 Santa Barbara: Downtown Garden Suites, D4 Santa Barbara: Downtown Garden Suites, D5 Santa Barbara: Downtown Garden Suites, D6 Los Angeles: Banana Bungalow West Hollywood, D7 Los Angeles: Banana Bungalow West Hollywood
